name: Bodyweight 3-Day Full-Body
description: No equipment, three full-body sessions per week. Push, pull (using a sturdy bar or door frame), legs, core. Built for travel and tight spaces.

1.name: Push-ups
1.description: Hands shoulder-width. Lower until chest grazes the floor.

1.name: Pull-ups
1.description: Bar or door frame. Pull chin over the bar. Slow lower.

1.name: Bodyweight Squats
1.description: Heels down, hips back, knees track the toes.

1.name: Pike Push-ups
1.description: Hips up, head between hands. Press the floor away.

1.name: Glute Bridges
1.description: Lying back. Drive heels, squeeze the glutes at the top.

1.name: Plank
1.description: Body in a straight line. Glutes and core tight.

3.name: Diamond Push-ups
3.description: Hands form a diamond. Triceps and inner chest.

3.name: Inverted Rows
3.description: Under a sturdy table or low bar. Pull the chest up.

3.name: Reverse Lunges
3.description: Step back, drop the back knee. Each leg.

3.name: Calf Raises
3.description: Up on the toes, lower under control. Add a step if you can.

3.name: Side Plank
3.description: Hold each side. Hips up, body straight.

3.name: Leg Raises
3.description: Lying back. Raise legs slowly, no momentum.

5.name: Wide Push-ups
5.description: Hands wider than shoulders. Outer chest focus.

5.name: Pull-ups
5.description: Wide grip. Pull chin over the bar.

5.name: Single-Leg Bridge
5.description: One leg lifted. Drive through the planted heel.

5.name: Bulgarian Split
5.description: Rear foot on a chair. Single-leg squat.

5.name: Hand-Release P-up
5.description: At the bottom, hands off the floor for a full second.

5.name: Hollow Hold
5.description: Lying back. Lower back pressed into the floor.
